sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103966" key="tima/oros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῑμάορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τιμωρός</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῑμάοχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τιμοῦχος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
